title: SAGO BROTHERS Air Dry Clay, 24 Colors Modelling Clay with 3 Tools & Project Booklet, Ultra Soft Light, DIY Creative Gifts, Arts and Crafts Kits for Kids Boys Girls Toys
features: Sago Brothers air dry clay can help kids enhance their logical thinking ability, confidence and sensory development. Keeping kids obsessing with crafting clay and staying away from electronics.Our air dry clay is the greatest arts and crafts for kids that help to broaden imagination and improve hands-on ability! Also the air dry clay is the ideal arts and crafts activity for adults alike!

72 PAGES TUTORIAL BOOK - Our modelling clay comes with 72 pages tutorial book that contains many tutorials for all ages. Including 50+ kinds of common shapes, foods, and animals that allow for colour recognition, mixing and matching, as well as learning how to clay painting. Tutorials allow kids to start with imitation, until they can create their own work.

THE GREATEST GIFTS - Our arts and crafts clay comes in a beautiful gifts box, offering rich colors, safe materials, and project book is perfect for kids toys gifts (birthday, christmas, party, festival and so on). Make it your go-to present, kids will be thrilled and won't be able to put it down! The arts and crafts clay will earn your children’s smile and worship!
NON TOXIC - Our modelling clay is 100% safe and Easy clean-up. EN71 & ASTM F963-17, CPSIA certified. Wheat, tree nut or peanut-free. Kid-friendly and parent approved!

WHAT YOU GET - 24 colours of air dry clay, 24 x extra sealed bags, 3 x clay tools, 1 x 72 pages tutorial book, 1 x after-sale service card, 1 x giftable package! (Rest assured, we do not include small parts due to choking hazards). Any questions about your modelling clay, please feel free to contact us, we will make sure to resolve all your concerns. With our 100% satisfaction guarantee, you have literally nothing to lose.
description: Product Description Sago Brothers air dry clay can help kids enhance their logical thinking ability, confidence and sensory development. Keeping kids obsessing with modeling clay and staying away from electronics. Sago Brothers air dry clay will bring great fun for kids and is a good choice for toys, arts and crafts. Create Your Own World No matter how busy you are, spend some time with your child to do crafting clay games together to help them develop creativity and imagination. Naturally Air Dry & Super Light Air dry clay is easy to model and shape and your project will dry naturally in 5-24 hours, no oven is needed. Soft to Touch Sago Brothers modeling clay is very soft and smooth, no odor, doesn't crack, fade, or lose shape. 72 PAGES Tutorial Book Including 50+ kinds of common shapes, foods, and cute animals. kids can master colour recognizing, mixing and matching, as well as clay painting etc. Colour Mixing & Brightness Gradient Mix any two colours of clay to make a new colour! Come and create more fun colours to play with! Clay Art Painting You can draw with the clay on any material such as wood, paper etc. Keep your own little work of art forever after it dried completely! Best Birthday Gift for Friends! Lovely Gifts for Kids! WAHT YOU GET? 24 colors of air dry clay, 24 x extra sealed bags for storage 3 x clay tools, 1 x 72 pages tutorial book 1 x giftable package. WARNING NOT FOR KIDS UNDER 3 YEARS OLD. CHILDREN SHOULD BE UNDER ADULT SUPERVISION WHILE PLAYING. NOT FOR EATING. ABOUT Sago Brothers As a handcrafted toy brand, Sago Brothers aims to inspire children's creativity and psychological development. Kids as young as 3 can start playing with our clay! Sago Brothers' modelling clay has delighted teachers, parents, and children in over ten countries in North America and Europe. Each year, we sell over 1 million pounds of air dry clay throughout the world! Sago Brothers air dry clay is softer and smoother than other clays, allowing for effortless play. This modelling clay is easy to shape and can be painted on after drying, allowing you to preserve your projects forever. Sago Brothers modelling clay won't leave a residue on your hands or surfaces and there's no need to worry about crumbs or a time-consuming clean up because this modelling clay is mess-free!Sago Brothers air dry clay as the great arts and crafts for kids, also is the very popular toys and gifts for girls and boys no matter how old they are. WHY CHOOSE US? Compared to Polymer Oven Bake Clay - Sago Brothers air dry clay is super lightweight, it's soft and easy for kids to work with, won't stick to surfaces, and air dries in 5-24 hours, no oven is needed. Compared to Dough - Sago Brothers air dry clay is not greasy, doesn't crack or lose shape after drying, and is wheat-free. Compared to Other Clay - Sago Brothers air dry clay is 100% safe, without odor, and allergen friendly. Compliant with United States and European toy testing standards.
